Second Test Document for Multiple Upload Testing

This is document #2 in a batch upload test.

Product Information:
- Product A: 500 units sold
- Product B: 750 units sold
- Product C: 300 units sold
- Total Units: 1,550

Sales Regions:
- North: 40% of sales
- South: 35% of sales
- East: 15% of sales
- West: 10% of sales

Monthly Performance:
- January: $85,000
- February: $92,000
- March: $88,000

This document verifies batch processing functionality.
